signals.headline: Trump Announces 2-Week Ceasefire with Iran | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Announces 2-Week Ceasefire with Iran | YES | HIGH confidence**  
President Donald Trump announced a two-week ceasefire agreement with Iran on April 7-8, 2026, shifting from morning threats of "annihilation" to acceptance of Iran's "workable" ten-point peace plan, ahead of an 8 p.m. ET deadline.[1][2][3]

signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation at 2.2% YoY, Below Forecasts Amid Oil Surge | NO | MED confidence**

South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% prior, but undershot market expectations of 2.4%, with core inflation easing to 2.2% from 2.3%.[1][3] Monthly CPI increased 0.3%, weaker than the 0.6% forecast, despite petroleum jumps of 10.4%, offset by falling agricultural
